attributes.description: AWS SQS dashboard for CloudWatch metrics collected by the OpenTelemetry Collector.

embeddableConfig.description:
Monitor AWS SQS queues across your infrastructure in real time.
Filter by model at the top. Spot cold starts, errors, and duration outliers in the summary table then click any model to drill down.
To get started, instrument your SQS queues with the Elastic agent.

attributes.description: Navigation tile — clicking opens the Kibana Dashboards library searched for “AWS OTel” dashboards in a new browser tab, carrying the current panel time range to the destination.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
ROW value = "AWS-Managed-OTel" | KEEP value

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
ROW value = "AWS-Managed-OTel" | KEEP value

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation tile — clicking opens the Kibana Dashboards library searched for “AWS OTel” dashboards in a new browser tab, carrying the current panel time range to the destination.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-*
| WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != ""
  AND stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum")
| STATS q_sent = SUM(sum_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL))),
    q_oldest = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))),
    q_depth = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL)))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), QueueName, cloud.region
| EVAL state = CASE(
    q_sent IS NULL AND q_oldest IS NULL AND q_depth IS NULL, "Unknown",
    q_depth > 1000, "backlogged",
    q_oldest > 300, "stale",
    "healthy")
| STATS total = COUNT(*),
    stale = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "stale",
    backlogged = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "backlogged",
    healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy"
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp ASC

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-*
| WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != ""
  AND stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum")
| STATS q_sent = SUM(sum_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL))),
    q_oldest = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))),
    q_depth = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL)))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), QueueName, cloud.region
| EVAL state = CASE(
    q_sent IS NULL AND q_oldest IS NULL AND q_depth IS NULL, "Unknown",
    q_depth > 1000, "backlogged",
    q_oldest > 300, "stale",
    "healthy")
| STATS total = COUNT(*),
    stale = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "stale",
    backlogged = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "backlogged",
    healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy"
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Count of SQS queues over time, classified per time bucket by state — stale (oldest message > 5 min), backlogged (> 1000 visible), healthy, or idle. A rising stale or backlogged series indicates consumers falling behind.
embeddableConfig.title: Queue count over time

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-*
| WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != ""
  AND stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum")
| STATS q_sent = SUM(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL))),
    q_oldest = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))),
    q_depth = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))),
    last_ms = MAX(TO_LONG(@timestamp))
  BY QueueName, cloud.region
| INLINE STATS latest_ms = MAX(last_ms)
| WHERE (latest_ms - last_ms) <= 300000
| EVAL sqs_state = CASE(
    q_sent IS NULL AND q_oldest IS NULL AND q_depth IS NULL, "Unknown",
    q_depth > 1000, "backlogged",
    q_oldest > 300, "stale",
    "healthy")
| STATS queues = COUNT(*) BY sqs_state

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-*
| WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != ""
  AND stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum")
| STATS q_sent = SUM(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL))),
    q_oldest = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))),
    q_depth = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))),
    last_ms = MAX(TO_LONG(@timestamp))
  BY QueueName, cloud.region
| INLINE STATS latest_ms = MAX(last_ms)
| WHERE (latest_ms - last_ms) <= 300000
| EVAL sqs_state = CASE(
    q_sent IS NULL AND q_oldest IS NULL AND q_depth IS NULL, "Unknown",
    q_depth > 1000, "backlogged",
    q_oldest > 300, "stale",
    "healthy")
| STATS queues = COUNT(*) BY sqs_state

embeddableConfig.description: Share of SQS queues by latest state — stale (oldest message > 5 min), backlogged (> 1000 visible), healthy, or idle. Uses the most recent value per queue within a 5-minute freshness window.
embeddableConfig.title: Queues by status

embeddableConfig.description: One hexagon per SQS queue, ordered worst-first with stale or backlogged queues first. Toggle Color by between Status, Oldest Message Age, or Queue Depth; metric views support Min, Max, Avg, and Last over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon to filter the dashboard or open metrics for that queue.

savedVis.description: One hexagon per SQS queue, ordered worst-first with stale or backlogged queues first. Toggle Color by between Status, Oldest Message Age, or Queue Depth; metric views support Min, Max, Avg, and Last over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon to filter the dashboard or open metrics for that queue.
savedVis.title: SQS queues — hexagon map

embeddableConfig.title: SQS queues — hexagon map (click an hex for actions)

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-*
| WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != ""
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY QueueName, cloud.region
| INLINE STATS latest = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest) <= 5
| STATS total = COUNT(*)
| KEEP total

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-*
| WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != ""
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY QueueName, cloud.region
| INLINE STATS latest = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest) <= 5
| STATS total = COUNT(*)
| KEEP total

embeddableConfig.description: Total number of SQS queues — distinct queues reporting metrics in the latest collected data for the selected time range.
embeddableConfig.title: Total queues

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-*
| WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != ""
  AND stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum")
| STATS sent_cur = SUM(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL))),
    oldest_cur = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))),
    depth_cur = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))),
    last_ms = MAX(TO_LONG(@timestamp))
  BY QueueName, cloud.region
| INLINE STATS latest_ms = MAX(last_ms)
| WHERE (latest_ms - last_ms) <= 300000
| EVAL state = CASE(
    sent_cur IS NULL AND oldest_cur IS NULL AND depth_cur IS NULL, "Unknown",
    depth_cur > 1000, "backlogged",
    oldest_cur > 300, "stale",
    "healthy")
| STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy"
| KEEP healthy

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-*
| WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != ""
  AND stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum")
| STATS sent_cur = SUM(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL))),
    oldest_cur = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))),
    depth_cur = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum",
      `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))),
    last_ms = MAX(TO_LONG(@timestamp))
  BY QueueName, cloud.region
| INLINE STATS latest_ms = MAX(last_ms)
| WHERE (latest_ms - last_ms) <= 300000
| EVAL state = CASE(
    sent_cur IS NULL AND oldest_cur IS NULL AND depth_cur IS NULL, "Unknown",
    depth_cur > 1000, "backlogged",
    oldest_cur > 300, "stale",
    "healthy")
| STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy"
| KEEP healthy

embeddableConfig.description: Number of SQS queues actively producing messages with oldest-message age ≤ 5 min and depth below the backlog threshold, within a 5-minute freshness window.
embeddableConfig.title: Healthy queues

attributes.description: Number of SQS queues whose oldest message exceeded 5 minutes, within a 5-minute freshness window. Indicates consumers not keeping up or stuck.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" AND stat == "Maximum" AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage` IS NOT NULL | STATS oldest = MAX(last_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`)), last_ms = MAX(TO_LONG(@timestamp)) BY QueueName, cloud.region | INLINE STATS latest_ms = MAX(last_ms) | WHERE (latest_ms - last_ms) <= 300000 | STATS stale = COUNT(*) WHERE oldest > 300 | KEEP stale

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" AND stat == "Maximum" AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage` IS NOT NULL | STATS oldest = MAX(last_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`)), last_ms = MAX(TO_LONG(@timestamp)) BY QueueName, cloud.region | INLINE STATS latest_ms = MAX(last_ms) | WHERE (latest_ms - last_ms) <= 300000 | STATS stale = COUNT(*) WHERE oldest > 300 | KEEP stale

attributes.description: Number of SQS queues with more than 1000 visible messages, within a 5-minute freshness window. Indicates queue depth building up faster than it drains.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" AND stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS sent_cur = SUM(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL))), oldest_cur = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))), depth_cur = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))), last_ms = MAX(TO_LONG(@timestamp)) BY QueueName, cloud.region | INLINE STATS latest_ms = MAX(last_ms) | WHERE (latest_ms - last_ms) <= 300000 | EVAL state = CASE(sent_cur IS NULL AND oldest_cur IS NULL AND depth_cur IS NULL, "Unknown", depth_cur > 1000, "backlogged", oldest_cur > 300, "stale", "healthy") | STATS backlogged = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "backlogged" | KEEP backlogged

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" AND stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS sent_cur = SUM(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL))), oldest_cur = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))), depth_cur = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))), last_ms = MAX(TO_LONG(@timestamp)) BY QueueName, cloud.region | INLINE STATS latest_ms = MAX(last_ms) | WHERE (latest_ms - last_ms) <= 300000 | EVAL state = CASE(sent_cur IS NULL AND oldest_cur IS NULL AND depth_cur IS NULL, "Unknown", depth_cur > 1000, "backlogged", oldest_cur > 300, "stale", "healthy") | STATS backlogged = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "backlogged" | KEEP backlogged

embeddableConfig.description: Number of SQS queues with more than 1000 visible messages, within a 5-minute freshness window. Indicates queue depth building up faster than it drains.
embeddableConfig.title: Backlogged queues (>1000 visible)

attributes.description: All SQS queues, ranked worst-first by state. Click a queue to drill into its metrics. State reflects the latest values within a 5-minute freshness window. Sent, received, deleted, and empty-receives are totals summed over the selected time range; depth, in-flight, and oldest-message-age are peak (max) values over the range.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" AND stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS c_sent = SUM(sum_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL))), c_recv = SUM(sum_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesReceived`, NULL))), c_del = SUM(sum_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesDeleted`, NULL))), c_empty = SUM(sum_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfEmptyReceives`, NULL))), c_depth = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))), c_inflight = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesNotVisible`, NULL))), c_oldest = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))), state_sent = SUM(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL))), state_depth = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))), state_oldest = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))) BY QueueName, c_account = cloud.account.id, c_region = cloud.region | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(state_sent IS NULL AND state_oldest IS NULL AND state_depth IS NULL, 4, state_depth > 1000, 1, state_oldest > 300, 2, 3), c_state = CASE(state_sent IS NULL AND state_oldest IS NULL AND state_depth IS NULL, "Unknown", state_depth > 1000, "backlogged", state_oldest > 300, "stale", "healthy") | SORT c_state_sort ASC

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" AND stat IN ("Maximum", "Sum") | STATS c_sent = SUM(sum_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL))), c_recv = SUM(sum_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesReceived`, NULL))), c_del = SUM(sum_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesDeleted`, NULL))), c_empty = SUM(sum_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfEmptyReceives`, NULL))), c_depth = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))), c_inflight = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesNotVisible`, NULL))), c_oldest = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))), state_sent = SUM(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL))), state_depth = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))), state_oldest = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))) BY QueueName, c_account = cloud.account.id, c_region = cloud.region | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(state_sent IS NULL AND state_oldest IS NULL AND state_depth IS NULL, 4, state_depth > 1000, 1, state_oldest > 300, 2, 3), c_state = CASE(state_sent IS NULL AND state_oldest IS NULL AND state_depth IS NULL, "Unknown", state_depth > 1000, "backlogged", state_oldest > 300, "stale", "healthy") | SORT c_state_sort ASC

attributes.description: Total messages enqueued across all SQS queues, summed over the selected time range. Grows as the range widens.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS messages_sent = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`))

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS messages_sent = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`))

attributes.description: Total messages successfully processed (deleted) across all SQS queues, summed over the selected time range. Compare with sent to gauge whether consumers keep up.

attributes.description: Top 10 SQS queues by total messages sent, summed over the selected time range.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat == "Sum" AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent` IS NOT NULL | STATS sent = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`)) BY QueueName, cloud.region | SORT sent DESC | LIMIT 10

attributes.description: Peak age of the oldest message per queue over time (seconds, max per bucket). Reference line at 300s marks the staleness threshold. Top 10 queues by oldest-message age per bucket; spikes indicate consumers stalled or too slow.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
ROW alert_threshold = 300

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat == "Maximum" | STATS metric = MAX(max_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), QueueName, cloud.region | WHERE metric IS NOT NULL | SORT timestamp ASC, metric DESC, QueueName ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat == "Maximum" | STATS metric = MAX(max_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), QueueName, cloud.region | WHERE metric IS NOT NULL | SORT timestamp ASC, metric DESC, QueueName ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp

attributes.title: Top 10 SQS queues by oldest message age (s)

embeddableConfig.description: Peak age of the oldest message per queue over time (seconds, max per bucket). Reference line at 300s marks the staleness threshold. Top 10 queues by oldest-message age per bucket; spikes indicate consumers stalled or too slow.

attributes.description: Peak visible (ready-to-consume) messages per queue over time (max per bucket). Reference line at 1000 marks the backlog threshold. Top 10 queues by depth per bucket; sustained growth indicates consumers falling behind producers.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
ROW alert_threshold = 1000

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat == "Maximum" | STATS metric = MAX(max_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), QueueName, cloud.region | WHERE metric IS NOT NULL | SORT timestamp ASC, metric DESC, QueueName ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.sqs.otel-* | WHERE QueueName IS NOT NULL AND QueueName != "" | WHERE stat == "Maximum" | STATS metric = MAX(max_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), QueueName, cloud.region | WHERE metric IS NOT NULL | SORT timestamp ASC, metric DESC, QueueName ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
